venue: Divine Mercy Church, Malaiyappa Mudali St, Kelambakkam, Chennai
description: Marion Jemima and Livingston solemnize their marriage in a sacred Nuptial Mass officiated by the Church Father. Vows will be exchanged, rings blessed, and two families united before God in the hallowed light of Divine Mercy Church.
dressCode: Formal and semi-formal attire. Ladies in sarees, salwars, or western formals. Gentlemen in suits, sherwanis, or dress shirts.

venue: Blue Bay Beach Resort, Mahabalipuram, Chennai
description: As the sun sets over the Bay of Bengal, the celebration moves to the beach lawn at Blue Bay Resort. An evening of dinner, toasts, music, and dancing — the sea breeze carrying the sounds of a new beginning across the shoreline.
dressCode: Coastal elegance — whites, creams, champagne, soft golds, and touches of green. Think breezy, beautiful, and beachside-formal.
